case_title: LARIVE, ROBERT T. et al VS LEE, TOM MR. et al

docket_entries.description: EXHIBITS ORDERED DESTROYED.

OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF APR-03-1997, NO APPEARANCE, ORDER OF ARREST TO ISSUE, BAIL $500.00, AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, TOM MR.

COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $500.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, TOM MR.
THE $3500 ACCRUED COSTS FILED ON 7/24/97 IN THE MEMO OF COSTS AFTER JUDGMENT IS DELETED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LARIVE, ROBERT T. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEE, TOM MR. $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,515.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
